headline: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for April 28, 2026
summary: For the four weeks ending April 11, 2026, U.S. private employers added an average of 39,250 jobs per week, according to the NER Pulse, a weekly update of the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER).

headline: ADP Earnings: What To Look For From ADP
summary: Payroll and HR services provider Automatic Data Processing (NASDAQ:ADP) will be announcing earnings results this Wednesday before the bell. Here’s what investors should know.
